title: OrdoRunArchiveManifest
description: Self-description for an .ordo-run archive, lives at the archive root as manifest.json. Authored in Ordo (github.com/kwad77/ordo), mirrored into Stoa under contracts/ordo-run-archive/ per D-002. See docs/ORDO-RUN-ARCHIVE.md for the prose spec.

format_version.description: Semver of the .ordo-run format itself. Tracked independently of Ordo's version. This doc defines 0.1.0.

ordo_version.description: stoa.component.yaml metadata.version at the time the archive was written.

run_id.description: SCP ULID. Matches envelope.runId on every event inside events.ndjson.

legacy_run_id.description: Ordo's human-readable run id used under evidence/<date>/<run-id>/ on disk.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of archive creation.

planner_model.description: Provider-specific model identifier used by the planner iter. Optional — absent when the plan was hand-authored.

models_used.description: Distinct provider model identifiers seen across all iters. Sorted alphabetically.

providers_used.description: Distinct provider slugs (claude, gemini, codex) seen across all iters. Sorted alphabetically.

prompt.description: The user's original prompt, stored verbatim for display + search.

sha256_of_contents.description: SHA-256 of the concatenation of every contents[].sha256 string in the order listed. Detects tampering without re-hashing every entry.
